# Email Spam Shield

> A self-contained, multi-layer anti-spam plugin for WordPress. It blocks contact-form, comment, and registration spam using a 7-layer detection engine — with zero cloud dependency, so no visitor data ever leaves the site owner's server.

Email Spam Shield scores every form submission across seven independent layers before it reaches the inbox or database. All checks run locally on the WordPress server: there are no external accounts, API keys, or third-party calls, which keeps it GDPR-friendly and privacy-preserving.

## What it does

- **7-layer detection engine**: each submission is evaluated by seven independent checks and scored before it is accepted, flagged, or blocked.
- **Disposable email blocking**: a local database of 100,000+ disposable/temporary email domains, refreshed on a schedule, blocks burner inboxes instantly.
- **Spam-IP threat feeds**: known spam and abusive IP ranges are filtered out.
- **SMTP mailbox verification**: confirms an email address can actually receive mail.
- **Content spam analysis**: inspects message content for spam signals.
- **Honeypot and bot detection**: catches automated bot submissions.
- **Offline country blocking**: geo-blocks selected countries using a local database — no external geo-IP service required.
- **Real-time form validation**: validates fields as the visitor types.

## Supported integrations

Works with WordPress native comments and user registration, plus every major form plugin: WooCommerce, Contact Form 7, WPForms, Ninja Forms, Fluent Forms, and Gravity Forms.

## Key facts

- **Platform**: WordPress plugin.
- **Privacy**: fully self-contained — every check runs on the site owner's own server, nothing is sent to the cloud.
- **Category**: security / anti-spam.
- **Pricing**: starts at $39 USD (one-time). See the pricing section for current tiers.

## Common questions

- **Does it stop WordPress contact-form spam?** Yes — it hooks into every major form plugin and scores each submission across seven layers before it reaches the inbox or database.
- **Which form plugins are supported?** WooCommerce, Contact Form 7, WPForms, Ninja Forms, Fluent Forms, Gravity Forms, plus native WordPress comments and user registration.
- **Does it block disposable or temporary email addresses?** Yes — a local database of 100,000+ disposable domains is updated on a schedule and blocks burner inboxes instantly.
- **Does any data leave my server?** No — every check runs on the WordPress server with no external accounts or API keys, so no visitor data is ever sent to the cloud.
